summary: Reviews flag incorrect date metadata; no comments on audio quality or performance
review: Both reviewers point out that the recording’s main date and identifier are wrong, indicating a need for metadata correction. No information is provided about the soundboard source, mix clarity, setlist flow, or individual performances.

ai_rating.rationale: Only metadata issues are mentioned; there is no substantive feedback on musical or technical quality, limiting the ability to assign a higher rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments on sound quality, clarity, or mix; reviewers only note date/identifier errors.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No information provided about the performance or set structure.
